title: ailanthus integrifolia
intro: Ailanthus integrifolia, also known as the Chinese Ailanthus or Tree of Heaven, is a deciduous tree native to China and commonly found in urban landscapes. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ailanthus integrifolia include treating fever, sore throat, and skin conditions, as well as relieving coughs and respiratory issues. Ailanthus integrifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
